description.unified: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
Deals Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

Deals Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [1.5sec->1sec], and reduces their Critical Chance by [60%->25%] for [4sec->7sec]. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing Magic Damage, knocking them back for [1sec->0.5sec], and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

dark.unified: For [4 sec->7 sec], reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by [500->150].

description.unified: [Twinkle Twinkle] The Crit Chance Reduction effect becomes irremovable, and increases the duration by {0} sec.

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [15%->10%], and damage taken is reduced by [15%->10%].
